name: Ariana Blake
bio: Met during university orientation. Ariana is the friend who remembers birthdays, sends book recommendations, and makes time for deep catch-up calls.

name: Marcus Reed
bio: Marcus became a close friend through early morning gym sessions. He is dependable, upbeat, and always suggests a new coffee place after workouts.

name: Sofia Chen
bio: Sofia was a former teammate who became a thoughtful mentor. She gives practical career advice and enjoys talking about product strategy.

name: Daniel Brooks
bio: Daniel is an old school friend and longtime gaming partner. Conversations usually start with games and end with life updates.

name: Maya Thompson
bio: Maya is a family friend who loves planning short trips, discovering local restaurants, and taking photos of every memorable place.

name: Ethan Walker
bio: Ethan was introduced at a hackathon and stayed connected through side projects. He enjoys discussing SaaS ideas, AI tools, and startup lessons.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: Nadia is the friend who shares playlists before anyone else. She loves live music, late-night food, and honest conversations.

name: Liam Carter
bio: Liam is a neighborhood friend who organizes weekend football matches and keeps everyone connected through group plans.

name: Olivia Morgan
bio: Olivia is a creative friend who sends design inspiration, moodboards, and thoughtful feedback on personal projects.

name: Noah Martinez
bio: Noah is an online coding friend who gives honest feedback on side projects and enjoys discussing clean architecture.

name: Emma Collins
bio: Emma is a book club friend who finds quiet coffee shops and always has a thoughtful novel recommendation ready.

name: Ryan Hughes
bio: Ryan is a childhood friend and regular basketball rival. He is competitive on the court but supportive everywhere else.

name: Isabella Green
bio: Isabella is a photography friend who enjoys sunrise walks, city shoots, and documenting ordinary days beautifully.

name: James Wilson
bio: James is the friend who always knows which local events are worth attending and makes group plans feel easy.

name: Grace Miller
bio: Grace loves testing new restaurants and remembering small details about people. Catch-ups with her usually feel warm and effortless.

name: Benjamin Scott
bio: Benjamin is a university friend building small businesses. He shares useful lessons about consistency, sales, and staying motivated.
